sections.paragraph:
ρόθιος (ρόθιος, ον,)
Etym. ρόθος

I. rushing, roaring, dashing, of waves, Od.; of oars, Eur.

II. as Subst. ρόθια, τά, waves dashing on the beach, breakers, waves, Soph., etc.;—collectively in sg. the surf, surge, Aesch., Eur.

2. a shout of applause, Ar.; generally, a tumult, riot, Eur.
